title: AYIQUTY RC Drift Car, 1:24 Mini 4WD Remote Control Drift Cars with Semi Proportional Throttle and LED Light, 25KM/H RC Racing, Boys Toy Gifts Age 6 7 8 9 10+
features: 【4WD RC Drift Car】：RC drift car, 4WD, 1:24 ratio, semi-proportional throttle, maximum speed can reach 25KM/H. A racing car with high speed and drifting skills, very suitable for novice drivers and racers who want to hone their skills

【Two Tires Can be Replaced at Any Time】: Drift wheels and racing wheels can be replaced at any time, and drift wheels bring a smoother drifting experience to the car. Racing wheels provide stronger grip for the car, which can conquer various tracks

【Comprehensive Service】: Equipped with two 3.7V rechargeable lithium batteries and charging cables, providing ultra-long battery life and more fun. 4 obstacles are used to hone drifting skills. Screwdrivers and spare screws are provided to replace tires at any time to adapt to different tracks

【Carefully Designed】: The body is made of special ABS plastic, which improves durability, strength and aesthetics. The freely switchable lights bring a more realistic experience, allowing children to enjoy the fun of drifting remote control cars
【Gift for Drift Car Enthusiasts】: This drift car not only brings joy to children, but also big boys will love it. It is an ideal gift for drift car enthusiasts over 6 years old
description: Product Description AYIQUTY 4WD Drift Remote Control Car 2.4GHz Handheld Remote Control Control the drift car with a joystick, and the semi-proportional throttle provides different speeds. 4WD Drift Remote Control Car 4WD design, speed up to 25KM/H. 2 Types of Rubber Tires Drift wheels and racing wheels can be replaced at any time to bring different experiences. Accessories Bring More Fun 2 batteries provide more game time, obstacles hone your skills. You will receive: 1*4WD drift RC car 1*2.4GHz handheld remote control: 2 AA batteries (not included) 2*3.7V rechargeable lithium batteries, 1*USB battery charging cable 4*drift rubber wheels, 4*anti-slip rubber wheels 1*anti-slip screwdriver, 1*instruction manual, 4*obstacle barrels Great Toy Gift for Kids Aged 6+
